cards.body: Move guests from room selection to checkout, payment, and confirmation.

cards.body: Let hotels sell rooms, packages, F&B, spa, experiences, and add-ons where configured.

items.question: What is Booking Engine?
items.answer: Booking Engine is the transaction layer behind Wink booking paths for rooms, packages, add-ons, payment, and confirmation.

items.question: Who uses Booking Engine?
items.answer: Hotels use Booking Engine directly, while partner, Traveliko, and developer routes can resolve into the same checkout layer.

items.question: Where should visitors go next?
items.answer: Request a demo or view pricing: 5.5% all-in (1.5% Wink + 4.0% Stripe), no setup fee, no monthly fee, no contract.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
